data.title: Novonesis expands global footprint with acquisition of production facility in Southeast Asia
data.description: Novonesis has broadened its international presence through the purchase of a production facility in Southeast Asia. This move involves an investment of approximately $50 million, aimed at enhancing fermentation capacities and bolstering the company's strategic growth objectives over the long run.

data.title: Ant International Kicking off Alipay+’s Support for the 2026 New York Liberty Season and Sustainability Initiatives
data.description: In advance of the 2026 WNBA season, Ant International held an event in the U.S. to mark their collaboration with the New York Liberty. Leiming Chen, Senior Vice President and Chief Sustainability Officer of Ant International, outlined their plans to merge technology and sports to enhance community engagement. Ant International's Alipay+ forged a long-term partnership with the New York Liberty in 2025, solidifying its position as the team's official partner.

data.title: ETF365.com.hk Launches as Hong Kong’s Dedicated Hub for ETF Comparisons, Data Analytics, and Brokerage Reviews
data.description: In Hong Kong, ETF365.com.hk is now live as a leading platform offering guidance on Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) for both individual and institutional investors. The goal is to assist in making well-informed investment choices amid the increasing global asset allocation trend. Co-founded by Chris Tam and Eric Lee, the platform provides unbiased reviews, expert data analysis, and practical investment advice. This launch aims to establish ETF365.com.hk as the primary source for ETF insights, catering to the investment needs of Hong Kong investors.

data.title: Garrett Motion Showcases Breakthrough Oil-Free Centrifugal Compressor Portfolio at China Refrigeration Expo 2026
data.description: Cutting-edge cooling technologies have established record-breaking levels of efficiency for cooling in data centers and battery energy storage systems. These advancements mark a significant leap in performance, ensuring optimal cooling for these critical facilities. The technologies have achieved unparalleled energy savings, with cooling efficiency reaching unprecedented levels. This groundbreaking development in cooling technology is anticipated to revolutionize the efficiency standards in data centers and battery energy storage facilities.

data.title: ATLATL Announces Agreement with Daiichi Sankyo to Deepen APAC Biotech Innovation
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Shanghai, the ATLATL Innovation Center, a leading global platform for life science research and development, revealed a new partnership with Daiichi Sankyo. This collaboration will see ATLATL's diverse international R&D network being utilized in the joint efforts of the two organizations.
